notes: Diagnostic contracts authority (v10.3.0). Identity sign/scale only; units read from FAIR-MAST Level-2 zarr attrs (flux loops: Wb; pickups: T). Experimental columns are FAIR-MAST channel names verbatim (inputs/flux_loops.csv, inputs/pickups.csv); synthetic columns are geometry-authority probe names emitted by the FreeGSNKE inverse runner (synthetic/synthetic_fluxloops.csv, synthetic/synthetic_pickups.csv). Flux-loop pairs use the FAIR-MAST-internal rename FL_<channel with / -> _>, declared per contract. Probe families on other timebases (mirnov, saddle, omaha) are EXCLUDED: not extracted onto the shared magnetics timebase and/or measured in V (uncalibrated), so no honest identity contract exists for them. Channels that are entirely NaN in FAIR-MAST Level-2 for the authority-reference shot 30201 are also EXCLUDED (listed in the generator EXCLUDE_ALL_NAN_REF_SHOT_30201): P3L/4, CCBV02/21/32/35, OBV01/02/07/08/10/12-16/19, OBR02/03/07/11/19 — they remain in extract outputs for audit but cannot be scored.
